plugins.name: postgres
plugins.description: PostgreSQL database access with health diagnostics, slow query analysis, and connection monitoring

plugins.name: devlab
plugins.description: Task-centric project management for Dev Lab repos. Debate-driven task creation, terminal dashboards, and Notion sync.

plugins.name: butler
plugins.description: Work and personal task planner: breaks a task into human, session-sized chunks and time-boxes the day in TickTick around Google Calendar. Work gets packed focus blocks; personal gets light reminders. Executive-function support.
